title: A Girl I Met in Another World
overview: The Demon Lord is defeated, but Hinata's troubles have just begun. Especially when Mariabell refuses to let the boundaries between worlds keep him away from her.

title: Academy Life
overview: Mariabell is getting used to Hinata's world, but then she makes an alarming discovery: Hinata's been talking to another girl...

title: Shopping
overview: Mariabell plays volleyball and goes shopping with Hinata and Sakura.

title: Visitors From Another World
overview: Hinata and Mariabell's former party members arrive to drag her back to their world.

title: The Neighbor
overview: May's worried about Cecil and invites her and the rest of their friends to a hot spring for a little R&R. She also might be reviewing the springs for her live stream as well.

title: Parenting
overview: Why do Hinata and Sakura have a baby? Mariabell must know.

title: Love and Illness
overview: When Hinata catches a cold, it's up to Mariabell to nurse him back to health!

title: Debut as a Vendor - Part 1
overview: Sakura's new fantasy manga is all thanks to Hinata and Mariabell's adventures!

title: Debut as a Vendor - Part 2
overview: Sakura's manga is more popular than expected.

title: The Distance Between Us
overview: Mariabell's cosplay photos went viral and now she's getting unwanted attention from other boys.

title: The Temptation of the Sea?
overview: Hinata overthinks his relationship with Mariabell. Perhaps she can reassure him when they all go to the beach.

title: I'm Glad I Met You
overview: Hinata teaches Mariabell how to swim. A dolphin snatches Sakura's swimsuit and Hinata and Mariabell end up alone together. What will happen next?
